steps.title: Separate the school sentence
steps.content: The first sentence should say that San Juan High School and Grand County High School are among several Utah schools with hillside geoglyphs. The next idea begins a new sentence about the geoglyph overlooking San Juan High.

steps.title: Avoid clause punctuation errors
steps.content: Choice B incorrectly places a comma before a restrictive that clause and fuses the next idea. Choice C creates a comma splice. Choice D repeats the restrictive-clause comma error and still fuses the ideas. A period after geoglyphs creates the needed boundary. The answer is A.
